title: The Room That Remembers Rain
originalityStatement: An original calibration fixture written for this project; it does not adapt any Nintendo character, setting, map, puzzle, or story.

storyModel.premise: A night archivist discovers that opening an old theatre curtain changes which doors remember the storm outside.
storyModel.playerRole: Night archivist responsible for closing the building
storyModel.dramaticSpine: Observe two contradictory room states, learn the curtain rule through action, then earn the final ledger reveal.
interactionOpportunities: Compare the same doorway in both states
Read the ledger after direct observation
causalRules: Curtain state changes the remembered storm layer and therefore route availability
protectedCanon: The archivist caused no original disaster
The final ledger reveal must follow direct observation of both room states

productProfile.spatialBudget: three compact rooms and two state layers
